findings.repro: If `g.funder` is undefined, calling `g.funder[0] ?? null` will throw an error.
If `g.title` or `funder?.name` is undefined, calling `.toLowerCase()` will throw an error.
If `g.funder?.jurisdiction` is undefined, calling `.toLowerCase()` will throw an error.
If `g.evaluation?.eligibility_pass` is undefined, calling `!g.evaluation?.eligibility_pass` will throw an error.
If `g.deadline` is undefined, calling `deadlineMs(g.deadline)` will throw an error.
If `g.amount_cad_max` or `g.amount_cad_min` is undefined, calling `(b.amount_cad_max ?? b.amount_cad_min ?? 0) - (a.amount_cad_max ?? a.amount_cad_min ?? 0)` will throw an error.
If `g.discovered_at` is undefined, calling `deadlineMs(b.discovered_at)` will throw an error.
If `g.evaluation?.eligibility_pass` is undefined, calling `a.evaluation?.eligibility_pass ? 1 : 0` will throw an error.
If `g.evaluation?.fit_score` is undefined, calling `fitValue(b) - fitValue(a)` will throw an error.
If `g.deadline` is undefined, calling `deadlineMs(a.deadline) - deadlineMs(b.deadline)` will throw an error.
